heroTagline: A joyful place where little ones love to learn
heroSubtext: Nurturing curious minds from Nursery to Class 5 in Geruwa rural municipality-5 Pashupatinagar, Bardiya. We blend the national CDC curriculum with creative exploration.
aboutText: Model Pashupati English Medium School has been a cornerstone of quality education in Bardiya, Nepal. Our dedicated faculty and modern facilities provide the perfect environment for your child's growth.
